examples.query: When was the journey 'Birthday Message' published?
examples.sql:
SELECT name AS campaign_name,
       lastdeployedtime AS published_time
FROM dim_campaign
WHERE name IN ('Birthday Message', 'Gold Tier Welcome Email')
LIMIT 50

template: SELECT name AS campaign_name, lastdeployedtime AS published_time FROM dim_campaign WHERE name IN ('<literal>', '<literal>') LIMIT 50

examples.sql:
SELECT J.CAMPAIGNID AS campaign_id,
       J.NAME AS campaign_name,
       J.STATE AS campaign_state,
       J.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time
FROM DIM_CAMPAIGN AS J
WHERE LOWER(J.STATE) NOT IN ('deployed', 'redeployed')
LIMIT 50

template: SELECT J.CAMPAIGNID AS campaign_id, J.NAME AS campaign_name, J.STATE AS campaign_state, J.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time FROM DIM_CAMPAIGN AS J WHERE LOWER(J.STATE) NOT IN ('<literal>', '<literal>') LIMIT 50

examples.sql:
SELECT CAMPAIGN.NAME AS CAMPAIGNNAME,
       CAMPAIGN.CAMPAIGNID
FROM DIM_CAMPAIGN AS CAMPAIGN
LIMIT 10

template: SELECT CAMPAIGN.NAME AS CAMPAIGNNAME, CAMPAIGN.CAMPAIGNID FROM DIM_CAMPAIGN AS CAMPAIGN LIMIT 10

examples.query: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'SMS Opt-In', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results.
examples.sql:
SELECT 
    a.segmentid AS segment_id,
    a.name AS segment_name,
    a.totalmembers AS total_profiles,
    a.createdTime AS created_time,
    a.updatedTime AS updated_time
FROM dim_segment a
JOIN hkg_br_segment_target ad ON a.segmentid = ad.segmentid
JOIN dim_target d ON ad.targetId = d.targetId
WHERE d.dataflowName = 'SMS Opt-In'
ORDER BY a.name

template: SELECT a.segmentid AS segment_id, a.name AS segment_name, a.totalmembers AS total_profiles, a.createdTime AS created_time, a.updatedTime AS updated_time FROM dim_segment a JOIN hkg_br_segment_target ad ON a.segmentid = ad.segmentid JOIN dim_target d ON ad.targetId = d.targetId WHERE d.dataflowName = '<literal>' ORDER BY a.name

examples.query: Show me the IDs of failed dataflow runs
examples.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT S.DATAFLOWID AS dataflow_id
FROM DIM_CONNECTOR AS S
WHERE S.STATE ILIKE '%loyalty%'
LIMIT 50

template: SELECT DISTINCT S.DATAFLOWID AS dataflow_id FROM DIM_CONNECTOR AS S WHERE S.STATE ILIKE '<literal>' LIMIT 50

examples.query: Export a list of all destinations in the b2b-prod sandbox, sorted by most recently modified, including all columns associated with each destination, and include the 'modified' column for validation.
examples.sql:
SELECT D.targetId AS target_id,
       D.dataflowName AS dataflow_name,
       D.name AS target_name,
       D.description,
       D.state,
       D.connectionSpecId AS connection_spec_id,
       D.createdTime AS created_time,
       D.updatedTime AS modified,
       D.interval,
       D.frequency
FROM dim_target AS D
ORDER BY D.updatedTime DESC
LIMIT 50

template: SELECT D.targetId AS target_id, D.dataflowName AS dataflow_name, D.name AS target_name, D.description, D.state, D.connectionSpecId AS connection_spec_id, D.createdTime AS created_time, D.updatedTime AS modified, D.interval, D.frequency FROM dim_target AS D ORDER BY D.updatedTime DESC LIMIT 50

examples.query: How many datasets have been ingested using the same schema in the prod sandbox?
examples.sql:
SELECT S.blueprintid AS blueprint_id,
       S.name AS blueprint_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT DS.collectionid) AS collection_count
FROM dim_collection AS D
JOIN hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS DS ON D.collectionid = DS.collectionid
JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON DS.blueprintid = S.blueprintid
GROUP BY S.blueprintid,
         S.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT DS.collectionid) > 1

template: SELECT S.blueprintid AS blueprint_id, S.name AS blueprint_name, COUNT(DISTINCT DS.collectionid) AS collection_count FROM dim_collection AS D JOIN hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS DS ON D.collectionid = DS.collectionid JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON DS.blueprintid = S.blueprintid GROUP BY S.blueprintid, S.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT DS.collectionid) > 1

examples.query: List all datasets that use the schema 'hkg_adls_profile_count_history'.
examples.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT D.collectionid AS collection_id,
       D.name AS collection_name
FROM hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS SD
JOIN dim_collection AS D ON SD.collectionid = D.collectionid
JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON SD.blueprintid = S.blueprintid
WHERE S.name = 'hkg_adls_profile_count_history'
LIMIT 3

template: SELECT DISTINCT D.collectionid AS collection_id, D.name AS collection_name FROM hkg_br_blueprint_collection AS SD JOIN dim_collection AS D ON SD.collectionid = D.collectionid JOIN dim_blueprint AS S ON SD.blueprintid = S.blueprintid WHERE S.name = '<literal>' LIMIT 3

examples.query: show me the field for Person: Birthday Today 001
examples.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aa.property AS property_name, a.name AS segment_name
FROM hkg_br_segment_property aa
JOIN dim_segment a ON aa.segmentid = a.segmentid
WHERE a.name = 'Person: Birthday Today 001'
LIMIT 20

template: SELECT DISTINCT aa.property AS property_name, a.name AS segment_name FROM hkg_br_segment_property aa JOIN dim_segment a ON aa.segmentid = a.segmentid WHERE a.name = '<literal>' LIMIT 20

examples.query: Provide more details for the schema 'weRetail: Customer Actions'
examples.sql:
SELECT S.BLUEPRINTID AS blueprint_id,
       S.NAME,
       S.CLASS,
       S.ISPROFILEENABLED,
       S.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time,
       S.REQUIREDFIELDS AS required_fields,
       COUNT(DISTINCT SD.COLLECTIONID) AS collection_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT SA.PROPERTY) AS property_count
FROM DIM_BLUEPRINT AS S
LEFT JOIN HKG_BR_BLUEPRINT_COLLECTION AS SD ON S.BLUEPRINTID = SD.BLUEPRINTID
LEFT JOIN HKG_BR_BLUEPRINT_PROPERTY AS SA ON S.BLUEPRINTID = SA.BLUEPRINTID
WHERE LOWER(S.NAME) = LOWER('weRetail: Customer Actions')
GROUP BY S.BLUEPRINTID,
         S.NAME,
         S.CLASS,
         S.ISPROFILEENABLED,
         S.UPDATEDTIME,
         S.REQUIREDFIELDS
LIMIT 3

template: SELECT S.BLUEPRINTID AS blueprint_id, S.NAME, S.CLASS, S.ISPROFILEENABLED, S.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time, S.REQUIREDFIELDS AS required_fields, COUNT(DISTINCT SD.COLLECTIONID) AS collection_count, COUNT(DISTINCT SA.PROPERTY) AS property_count FROM DIM_BLUEPRINT AS S LEFT JOIN HKG_BR_BLUEPRINT_COLLECTION AS SD ON S.BLUEPRINTID = SD.BLUEPRINTID LEFT JOIN HKG_BR_BLUEPRINT_PROPERTY AS SA ON S.BLUEPRINTID = SA.BLUEPRINTID WHERE LOWER(S.NAME) = LOWER('<literal>') GROUP BY S.BLUEPRINTID, S.NAME, S.CLASS

examples.query: Count the number of XDM Experience Event schemas that are enabled for profile.
examples.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.BLUEPRINTID) AS num_experience_event_profile_enabled_blueprints
FROM DIM_BLUEPRINT AS S
WHERE LOWER(S.CLASS) LIKE LOWER('%download%')
  AND S.ISPROFILEENABLED = TRUE

template: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.BLUEPRINTID) AS num_experience_event_profile_enabled_blueprints FROM DIM_BLUEPRINT AS S WHERE LOWER(S.CLASS) LIKE LOWER('<literal>') AND S.ISPROFILEENABLED = TRUE

examples.query: How many schemas do I have?
examples.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.blueprintid) AS blueprint_count
FROM dim_blueprint AS S

template: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.blueprintid) AS blueprint_count FROM dim_blueprint AS S

examples.query: List all audiences in the sandbox that have been mapped to new destinations in the last 3 months.
examples.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT A.segmentid AS segment_id, A.name AS segment_name, D.targetId AS target_id, D.name AS target_name
FROM dim_segment AS A
JOIN hkg_br_segment_target AS AD ON A.segmentid = AD.segmentid
JOIN dim_target AS D ON AD.targetId = D.targetId
WHERE D.createdTime >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE)
LIMIT 3

template: SELECT DISTINCT A.segmentid AS segment_id, A.name AS segment_name, D.targetId AS target_id, D.name AS target_name FROM dim_segment AS A JOIN hkg_br_segment_target AS AD ON A.segmentid = AD.segmentid JOIN dim_target AS D ON AD.targetId = D.targetId WHERE D.createdTime >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 3

examples.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT D.COLLECTIONID AS collection_id,
       D.NAME AS collection_name,
       D.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time
FROM DIM_COLLECTION AS D
WHERE D.UPDATEDTIME >= DATEADD(DAY, -90, CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY D.UPDATEDTIME DESC
LIMIT 50

template: SELECT DISTINCT D.COLLECTIONID AS collection_id, D.NAME AS collection_name, D.UPDATEDTIME AS updated_time FROM DIM_COLLECTION AS D WHERE D.UPDATEDTIME >= DATEADD(DAY, -90, CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY D.UPDATEDTIME DESC LIMIT 50

examples.query: Show me all entities created by download
examples.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT collectionid AS collection_id, name AS collection_name, createdtime AS created_time
FROM dim_collection
WHERE createdby ILIKE '%download%'
LIMIT 20

template: SELECT DISTINCT collectionid AS collection_id, name AS collection_name, createdtime AS created_time FROM dim_collection WHERE createdby ILIKE '<literal>' LIMIT 20
